title: Carne asada with Taqueritos Chile Toreado
ingredients: 2 cups cooked and chopped carne asada
instructions: Step 1. Place a layer of whole Taqueritos Chile Toreado on a plate or tray forming the base.
Step 2. In a skillet, heat the creole sofrito over medium heat and pour it over the Taqueritos, distributing it evenly.
Step 3. In the same skillet, heat the carne asada until very hot and place it on top of the sauce.
Step 4. Add a scoop of guacamole over the meat and serve with sour cream to taste.
Step 5. Finish with chopped chives and sprinkle crushed Taqueritos Chile Toreado on top to add more crunch and spiciness before serving.
